name: Wipe Out The North
descriptionTemplate: When commanding armored units, deal +20% damage to non-building units other than city garrisons. If you are unable to attack or move after attacking, you have a X% chance to attack again (only once per turn). Each kill this turn increases this chance by 20% (max 100%), upgrading the effect to an extra action.
